title: The Man Who Reclaimed His Head
writer: Jean Bart, Finley Peter Dunne, Erwin Gelsey
actors: Claude Rains, Joan Bennett, Lionel Atwill
plot: A brilliant but impoverished writer, who is a pacifist, goes to work for a publisher and writes anti-war editorials. When he discovers that the publisher has betrayed him and is in league with munitions manufacturers to make money...
